programs.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programs.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.

programs.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programs.sub_title: Former US Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy
programs.desc: Philanthropist and financier David Rubenstein talks to the former U.S. Supreme Court Justice Anthony Kennedy.

programs.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026
programs.desc: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth.

programs.title: Bloomberg Primer
programs.sub_title: AI Is Pushing Chipmaking to Its Limits
programs.desc: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt.

programs.title: Bloomberg Primer
programs.sub_title: The Race To Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
programs.desc: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they're far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value, or will they fall short of the hype?

programs.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programs.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.
